'''hazhodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kymographion|kymographion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kymographion|kymographion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hazhodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhedeth|hæzhedeth]] || [[word:hæzhedej|hæzhedej]] || [[word:hæzhedesh|hæzhedesh]] || [[word:hæzhede|hæzhede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhozhodoth|hazhozhodoth]] || [[word:hazhozhodoj|hazhozhodoj]] || [[word:hazhozhodosh|hazhozhodosh]] || [[word:hazhozhodo|hazhozhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhodoth|hazhodoth]] || [[word:hazhodoj|hazhodoj]] || [[word:hazhodosh|hazhodosh]] || [[word:hazhodo|hazhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhofdoth|hazhofdoth]] || [[word:hazhofdoj|hazhofdoj]] || [[word:hazhofdosh|hazhofdosh]] || [[word:hazhofdof|hazhofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhodotho|hazhodotho]] || [[word:hazhodojo|hazhodojo]] || [[word:hazhodosho|hazhodosho]] || [[word:hazhodoko|hazhodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhodoth|hazhodoth]] || [[word:hazhodoj|hazhodoj]] || [[word:hazhodosh|hazhodosh]] || [[word:hazhodo|hazhodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhodothol|hazhodothol]] || [[word:hazhodojol|hazhodojol]] || [[word:hazhodoshol|hazhodoshol]] || [[word:hazhodokol|hazhodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhodothotho|hazhodothotho]] || [[word:hazhodojojo|hazhodojojo]] || [[word:hazhodoshosho|hazhodoshosho]] || [[word:hazhodoko|hazhodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhodothon|hazhodothon]] || [[word:hazhodojon|hazhodojon]] || [[word:hazhodoshon|hazhodoshon]] || [[word:hazhodokon|hazhodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhodothoro|hazhodothoro]] || [[word:hazhodojoro|hazhodojoro]] || [[word:hazhodoshoro|hazhodoshoro]] || [[word:hazhodokoro|hazhodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
